title: Uyo, Akwa Ibom — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Uyo, Akwa Ibom: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Uyo is a city in Akwa Ibom with a population of 500,000. The capital of Akwa Ibom State, a rapidly developing city in the Niger Delta region of southern Nigeria.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
